title: justicia glabribracteata
intro: Justicia glabribracteata, also known as "shrubby justicia" or "false mautotia", is a plant species in the Acanthaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and a boosted immune system. In herbal preparations, Justicia glabribracteata is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
